summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RTA app - Arabic language removal and admin user management functionality. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit button requires force click due to modal overlay interception

passed_tests: Arabic language (AR) successfully removed from login page language selector
Arabic language (AR) successfully removed from header language selector after login
Only PT, ES, EN language options available as expected
Admin login with thiago.toncovitch@concentrix.com / 1234 working correctly
Management tab (Gestão) accessible for admin users
User management interface (Gestão de Usuários) loads properly
Add User button (Adicionar) opens modal successfully
Add User modal contains all required fields: NAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD, confirmation
Form validation working - confirmation field requires 'add' text
Form fields are fillable and functional
User interface displays correctly in Portuguese
